inputs.label: Total Floor Area
inputs.businessContext: The total area of the floor to be covered with underlayment, measured in square feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The total area of the floor to be covered with underlayment, measured in square feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Altlık ile kaplanacak zeminin toplam alanı, fit kare cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die gesamte Bodenfläche, die mit Unterlage bedeckt werden soll, gemessen in Quadratfuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La surface totale du sol à recouvrir de sous-couche, mesurée en pieds carrés.

inputs.label: Roll Length
inputs.businessContext: The length of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The length of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir altlık rulosunun uzunluğu, fit cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Länge einer einzelnen Rolle Unterlage, in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La longueur d'un rouleau de sous-couche, en pieds.

inputs.label: Roll Width
inputs.businessContext: The width of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.

businessContext_i18n.en: The width of a single roll of underlayment, in feet.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Tek bir altlık rulosunun genişliği, fit cinsinden.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Breite einer einzelnen Rolle Unterlage, in Fuß.
businessContext_i18n.fr: La largeur d'un rouleau de sous-couche, en pieds.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: The percentage of additional material needed to account for cuts, fitting, and waste.

businessContext_i18n.en: The percentage of additional material needed to account for cuts, fitting, and waste.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Kesim, uyum ve fireyi hesaba katmak için gereken ek malzeme yüzdesi.
businessContext_i18n.de: Der Prozentsatz an zusätzlichem Material, der für Zuschnitte, Anpassung und Verschnitt benötigt wird.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le pourcentage de matériau supplémentaire nécessaire pour tenir compte des coupes, de l'ajustement et des déchets.

inputs.label: Price per Roll
inputs.businessContext: The cost of one roll of underlayment in US dollars.

businessContext_i18n.en: The cost of one roll of underlayment in US dollars.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir rulo altlığın ABD doları cinsinden maliyeti.
businessContext_i18n.de: Die Kosten einer Rolle Unterlage in US-Dollar.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Le coût d'un rouleau de sous-couche en dollars américains.

breakdown: One roll covers ${rollArea} sq ft (${rollLength} ft × ${rollWidth} ft).
Adjusted area with ${wasteFactor}% waste: ${neededArea} sq ft.
Exact number of rolls required (before rounding up): ${exactRolls}.
Total cost based on exact rolls: $${totalCost} (round up for purchase).
suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
